definition: Save % Points: .000-.899 = 0pts, .900-.919 = 2pts, .920-.939 = 4pts, .940-.959 = 6pts, .960-.979 = 8pts, .980-.999 = 10pts, 1.000 = 12pts; Save % Bonus = (Save % Points) x (Min Played/60) [Must be > 0]
formula: CASE WHEN toi <= 0 OR sv_pct < 0.900 THEN 0 WHEN sv_pct < 0.920 THEN 2 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 0.940 THEN 4 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 0.960 THEN 6 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 0.980 THEN 8 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 1.000 THEN 10 * (toi / 3600) ELSE 12 * (toi / 3600) END
notes: Goalie category; toi is stored in seconds.

definition: Save % Points: .000-.899 = 0pts, .900-.925 = 2pts, .925-.950 = 4pts, .950-.975 = 6pts, .975-1.000 = 8pts, 1.000 = 10pts; Save % Bonus = (Save % Points) x (Min Played/60) [Must be > 0]
formula: CASE WHEN toi <= 0 OR sv_pct < 0.900 THEN 0 WHEN sv_pct < 0.925 THEN 2 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 0.950 THEN 4 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 0.975 THEN 6 * (toi / 3600) WHEN sv_pct < 1.000 THEN 8 * (toi / 3600) ELSE 10 * (toi / 3600) END
notes: Goalie category; toi is stored in seconds.

definition: Save % Points: .000-.899 = 0pts, .900-.925 = 2pts, .925-.950 = 4pts, .950-.975 = 6pts, .975-1.000 = 8pts, 1.000 = 10pts; Save % Bonus = (Save % Points) x (Saves/60) [Must be > 0]
formula: CASE WHEN sv <= 0 OR sv_pct < 0.900 THEN 0 WHEN sv_pct < 0.925 THEN 2 * (sv / 60) WHEN sv_pct < 0.950 THEN 4 * (sv / 60) WHEN sv_pct < 0.975 THEN 6 * (sv / 60) WHEN sv_pct < 1.000 THEN 8 * (sv / 60) ELSE 10 * (sv / 60) END
notes: Goalie category.

formula: CASE WHEN toi <= 1800 OR sv_pct < 0.900 THEN 0 ELSE 0.5 * ((sv_pct - 0.900) / 0.01) * (toi / 3600) END
notes: Goalie category; toi is stored in seconds.
